creator: scp@mainstream.net
text:
We are experiencing panics on multiple systems, running the in kernel iscsi target

Systems all go through a panic loop started with a page fault, then 2 - 3 General Protection Fault Panics before the system returns to normal

Issue seams to be caused by heavy IO on the system not exclusively iscsi.
But ctld must be running for the panic to occur.

Up times very from a few minutes to a few days
I have a set of dumps for this most recent iteration on my home test box (it is experiencing the same issue as my other boxes)

We have tried reinstalling the system and a build world to no avail.

Here is the text of the inital panic, I can up load the tar ball of the rest of the data if needed (total size as a tbz2 is 977mb)

plfs.pl.mainstream.net dumped core - see /var/crash/vmcore.1

panic: page fault
